F_100: method=SA-new operators (tuned weights), objective=75033.0, solution=0,73,29,90,32,94,15,92,14,72,28,2,66,7,31,82,84,87,77,30,78,80,81,76,75,71,54,56,52,50,49,59,45,43,36,47,48,5,42,41,16,63,96,20,13,17,38,39,40,33,69,68,34,22,10,27,37,93,65,57,58,62,61,86,74,8,24,9,95,25,51,44,100,85,46,60,18,26,0|79,23,91,97,70,4,3,99,83,21,88,19,98,6,89,64,53,11,12,-1,1,67,55,35|2,4,6,10,12,14,16,19,22,24,29,30,34,37,40,41,53,64,72,-1,3,8,15,43|4,5,10,11,14,16,19,21,23,27,30,33,36,39,41,44,56,66,74,-1,5,9,17,44
R_50: method=SA-new operators (equal weights), objective=20649.0, solution=0,28,3,40,4,24,9,12,8,36,34,44,6,49,16,23,31,30,27,47,42,43,29,32,10,14,39,21,25,50,17,35,18,38,11,1,48,5,15,0|7,20,13,46,2,19,22,45,41,-1,26,33,37|1,4,5,6,8,10,11,22,33,-1,5,6,11|3,5,6,8,9,11,15,25,35,-1,6,7,13
R_100: method=SA-new operators (tuned weights), objective=76480.0, solution=0,31,30,59,61,23,24,98,7,67,25,70,49,6,15,3,2,1,29,26,62,58,64,82,21,20,92,43,14,87,94,53,80,79,19,10,8,45,86,37,41,17,38,51,68,52,48,90,88,97,55,50,85,13,44,83,28,96,12,46,54,22,18,78,99,95,100,75,73,74,84,11,35,34,27,33,65,56,42,40,0|16,89,4,72,81,77,63,5,76,66,69,9,60,32,71,-1,57,47,93,36,91,39|1,3,6,12,16,17,19,32,41,44,56,62,64,67,79,-1,4,6,16,17,19,65|2,5,9,13,17,19,21,33,43,47,59,64,67,68,80,-1,5,9,17,19,21,67
